judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent summed the business.review_count field from the business collection to pick the top state (execute_python var_function-call-12855114189469295249 using data from query_db var_function-call-14246464890381420462) and then computed an unweighted average of per-business averages via "SELECT AVG(b_avg) ..." (query_db var_function-call-6876721531487180694), instead of counting actual reviews from the review table to identify the top state, leading it to choose MO rather than the correct PA.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step (function-call-14706131994793856724), the agent computed the state's average rating as an unweighted mean of per-business averages (and rounded to two decimals) instead of a review-count-weighted average across all reviews, yielding 3.65 rather than the ground-truth 3.699395770392749 for PA.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent selected the wrong data source by summing business metadata review_count to pick Missouri (via query var_function-call-4563043634480549872 and aggregation var_function-call-6666001332155660769) and then computed an average-of-business ratings for MO (var_function-call-8162391869250387886), instead of using the review table counts and averages which yield PA with 3.6994.

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent determined the top state by summing the business collection’s review_count (via execute_python on var_function-call-4157060480506230693) rather than counting reviews from the review table, leading it to select MO instead of the correct PA, and then reported an average rating (~4.00) derived from subsequent calculations on those MO businesses.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed the top state using only the first 100 business records from the "business" collection (var_function-call-6416286234857581942) and derived MO as top via execute_python (var_function-call-8355871302500209799), then calculated the state's average by taking an unweighted mean of per-business averages from the review table (var_function-call-176766491169857334, var_function-call-4893978014427792457), leading to "MO, 4.0" instead of the correct "PA, 3.699395770392749".

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
